upgrade.name: Atlas Baseline Climb lane minigame
upgrade.summary: Promoted the AI/ML competitions lane from a generic checkpoint module into a custom Baseline Climb minigame with a generated benchmark-arena texture, ascent nodes, altitude scoring, and lane-derived climb stations.

research.query: AI benchmark leaderboard game UI progress climb design inspiration
research.takeaway: Benchmark progression works best when nearby climb targets and improvement steps are visible, not only final rank.

research.query: machine learning competition leaderboard dashboard gamification UI
research.takeaway: Leaderboard-oriented dashboards need dataset, metric, baseline, and submission gates to stay explicit.

research.query: data science competition platform leaderboard progress UI benchmark visualization
research.takeaway: Competition UX benefits from a score trail that distinguishes local evaluation from public submission.

imageGeneration.prompt: Premium dark game UI background for a Baseline Climb minigame about AI/ML competitions, benchmarks, datasets, and leaderboard progress. Futuristic benchmark arena with luminous climbing path, floating leaderboard pylons, dataset gate portals, evaluation rings, clean geometric platforms, dark open center for UI overlays, no text, no logos, no people.

implementation: Copied the generated benchmark-arena background into web/assets/games/baseline-climb-bg-20260617.png.
Added the texture path to ai_ml_competitions in web/data/lane-visuals.json.
Added baseline-climb dispatch to game routing and game step counts in web/app.js.
Added a lane-derived Baseline Climb model for eligibility, dataset, baseline, leaderboard, and submission stations.
Rendered an animated ascent route with score nodes, altitude verdict, station cards, meters, and existing game controls.
Added responsive CSS for docked side-panel, stacked desktop, and mobile layouts.
Documented the custom renderer and generated texture in web/README.md.

commands: rg -n "[^\x00-\x7F]" web\index.html web\app.js web\styles.css web\README.md web\data\lane-visuals.json reports\agent-company-atlas-baseline-climb-trace-metadata-20260617.json
